metadata.summary: Python wrapper for NHL API used in Home Assistant

documentation:
# pynhl
Python wrapper for the NHL API used in Home Assistant

modules.name: pynhl.classes
documentation: Python wrapper for the Undocumented NHL API by jayblackedout

classes.name: pynhl.classes.Player

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Player.player_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info

Representation of the NHL API Player dataset

...

Attributes
----------
player_id : str
    The 7 digit player ID of the defined player

Methods
-------
player_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info

classes.name: pynhl.classes.Team

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Team.team_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info

Representation of the NHL API Team dataset

...

Attributes
----------
team_id : str
    The 3 letter abbreviation (AKA tricode) of the defined team

Methods

team_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info

classes.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule.__init__
documentation: Returns the json data of the defined team's next scheduled game

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule.game_index
documentation: Parses the json data and returns the index of the current or next game

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule.game_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule.datetime_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of date and UTC time info

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Schedule.broadcast_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of broadcast info

Representation of the NHL API Schedule dataset

...

Attributes
----------
team_id : str
    The 3 letter abbreviation (AKA tricode) of the defined team

Methods
-------
game_index()
    Parses the json data and returns the index of the current or next game
game_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of game info
datetime_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of UTC date and time info
broadcast_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of broadcast info

classes.name: pynhl.classes.Plays

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Plays.__init__
documentation: Returns the json data of the defined team's last/current game

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Plays.scoring_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of scoring info

methods.name: pynhl.classes.Plays.linescore_info
documentation: Parses the json data and returns a dict of linescore info

Representation of the NHL API Plays dataset

...

Attributes
----------
game_id : str
    The 10 digit game id representing the desired game

Methods
-------
scoring_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of scoring info
linescore_info()
    Parses the json data and returns a dict of linescore info
